"Love" means that two people love each other, if a person unrequited love, it is a disease.
吸入: nǐ yòng nǎ yīzhǒng xīrù qì？
相亲相爱: 我想在一个人人相亲相爱的世界里生活。
wǒ xiǎng zài yīgè rénrén xiāngqīnxiāngài de shìjiè lǐ shēnghuó。
I want to live in a world where everyone love each other.
相较: 把它相较于其他有意思的活动：去电影院，看书，散步，跟朋友聊天等等。
bǎ tā xiāngjiào yú qítā yǒuyìsi de huódòng ： qù diànyǐngyuàn， kànshū， sànbù， gēn péngyou liáotiān děngděng。
It compared to other interesting activities: going to the cinema, reading, walking, chatting with friends, and so on.
相处: So hard to get along with him.
